profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Reliance Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk provides securities brokerage and underwriting services in Indonesia. The company also engages in the investment management business. PT Reliance Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk was incorporated in 1993 and is headquartered in Jakarta Barat, Indonesia. PT Reliance Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Reliance Capital Management.
